race.comment: Open race to close out the card. HEYOKA (5) resumes here but has two wins and a placing from four fresh attempts and has revved up for this with a recent trial placing. Boasts a win over this course and distance and makes plenty of appeal for a race of this nature. SAINT ALDWYN (12) has put back-to-back wins together and draws the inside marble with the 2kg claim. Plenty to like about his prospects. The well-related BREAK FREE (3) (half to G3 winner Snapped) has placed two of three over this trip and looks a genuine top-three hope with any luck from the wide draw. SUPERHERO (6) next best from the Archibald camp.
